name: Alert
summary: Add your proficiency bonus to initiative; swap initiative with a willing ally.

name: Crafter
summary: Tool proficiencies, faster crafting, discount buying.

name: Healer
summary: Stabilize and patch allies with a healer's kit; reroll 1s on healing dice.

name: Lucky
summary: Luck points to gain advantage or force disadvantage, refreshed each long rest.

name: Magic Initiate
summary: Two cantrips and a level-1 spell from the cleric, druid or wizard list.

name: Musician
summary: Instrument proficiencies; inspire allies with a song after rests.

name: Savage Attacker
summary: Once per turn, roll weapon damage twice and keep the higher.

name: Skilled
summary: Proficiency in any three skills or tools.

name: Tavern Brawler
summary: Punches hit harder, reroll 1s on their damage, shove once per turn.

name: Tough
summary: +2 hit points per level, now and every level after.

name: Grappler
summary: Advantage on attacks against creatures you're grappling; grapple with unarmed strikes. Requires STR or DEX 13+.

name: Archery
summary: +2 to attack rolls with ranged weapons.

name: Dueling
summary: +2 damage with a one-handed weapon and no other weapon.

name: Great Weapon Fighting
summary: Treat 1s and 2s on damage dice as 3s with two-handed weapons.

name: Two-Weapon Fighting
summary: Add your ability modifier to off-hand weapon damage.
